docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY HARTMAN, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT HUNNICUTT, VERONICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARTMAN, ROBERT ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-31-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HUNNICUTT, VERONICA
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED TO DEFENDANT.

NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY SCOTT DICKEY- GENERAL COUNCIL. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. NOT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: B.PAREDES. NOT REPORTED. (506)
